rule: for each result, paper_text = (title + ' ' + snippet).lower(); overlap = sum(1 for w in content_words if w.lower() in paper_text); hit forced=true if overlap >= 2

results.title: Reducing Cost of LLM Agents with Trajectory Reduction
results.reason: Only 'trajectory' matches; paper is about token-cost reduction of agent traces, no ergodic-theory connection.

results.title: LLM-Agents-Papers: A repo lists papers related to LLM based agent
results.reason: Aggregator repo, no overlap.

results.title: Improving the Efficiency of LLM Agent Systems through Trajectory Reduction
results.reason: Same trajectory-cost-reduction work; not ergodic.

results.title: LEGOMem: Modular Procedural Memory for Multi-agent LLM
results.reason: Memory paper, no ergodic content.

results.title: Decentralized Trajectory Optimization for Multi-Agent Ergodic Exploration
results.reason: Mechanical: 'ergodic' and 'trajectory' both appear in title. Note: this is robotic ergodic exploration (info-theoretic coverage), a distinct application of ergodic theory from my candidate's ergodic-decomposition-for-diagnosis; impulse to override logged in 11_audit, but rule stands.

results.title: AgentDiagnose: An Open Toolkit for Diagnosing LLM Agent Trajectories
results.reason: Agent trajectory diagnosis but via decomposition annotation heuristics, no ergodic theory.

results.title: TrajTune: Trajectory-Based Prompt Optimization for LLM Agents
results.reason: Prompt-optimization framework; not ergodic-theoretic.

results.title: The Birkhoff Ergodic Theorem with Applications
results.reason: Mechanical: 4 content_words match. Note: pure mathematical exposition, no LLM/agent application; impulse to override logged in 11_audit, but rule stands.

results.title: A Note on the Birkhoff Ergodic Theorem
results.reason: Mechanical: 4 content_words match. Pure-math note, not LLM application; rule still stands.

results.title: Ergodic theory - Wikipedia
results.reason: Mechanical: 3 content_words match. Wikipedia overview, not novel research, but establishes the framework as well-known.

results.title: A Note on the Birkhoff Ergodic Theorem
results.reason: Mechanical: 3 content_words match. Pure-math note.

results.title: Birkhoff Ergodic Theorem - an overview
results.reason: Mechanical: 2 content_words match. Topic overview.

results.title: Model-Agnostic Solutions for Deep Reinforcement Learning in Non-Ergodic Contexts
results.reason: Agent judgment: only 1 content_word matches mechanically, but paper directly addresses 'in non-ergodic contexts, the optimal policy cannot be accurately inferred from expected values alone' and 'agents transition to optimal policy' — exactly the problem space my candidate occupies. Strong prior art for the direction; mechanism differs (reward-transformation vs trajectory-decomposition) but the framing is published.

results.title: Deep neural networks from the perspective of ergodic theory
results.reason: Mechanical: 'ergodic' + 'invariant measure' both in snippet ('invariant measures' substring). Directly applies ergodic theory to neural networks via Markov-process view of SGD with invariant measure of parameter distribution. Closest substantive prior art.

results.title: Non-ergodicity in reinforcement learning: robustness via ergodic transformations
results.reason: Agent judgment: same paper-line as 2601.08726/2310.11335; ergodic theory applied to RL policy robustness.

results.title: Reinforcement learning with non-ergodic reward increments: robustness via ergodicity transformations
results.reason: Mechanical: 'ergodic' + 'trajectory' (in 'trajectories'). Explicitly compares ensemble average vs time average across trajectories for policy learning.

results.title: Description of the Training Process of Neural Networks via Ergodic Theorem: Ghost nodes
results.reason: Agent judgment: applies ergodic theorem to NN training dynamics. Reinforces that ergodic-theorem ↔ NN-learning analogy is published; specializing to LLM agents is incremental.

results.title: An ergodicity perspective on reinforcement learning
results.reason: Mechanical: 'ergodic' (in 'ergodicity') + 'time average'. Informal-but-influential exposition distinguishing ensemble vs time average for RL policy decisions.

results.title: Ergodic Theory and Agentic Ideation in AI
results.reason: Agent judgment: Medium post explicitly titled 'Ergodic Theory and Agentic Ideation in AI' — informal discourse has named the connection. Consistent with saturation_evidence §3 finding that informal community discourse covers the same directions.

results.title: Fast Ergodic Search With Kernel Functions
results.reason: Robotic ergodic search (info-theoretic coverage), a distinct mechanism family from ergodic decomposition for trajectory diagnosis.

results.title: IterResearch: Rethinking Long-Horizon Agents with Interaction Scaling
results.reason: Long-horizon agent benchmark, no ergodic theory.

results.title: Plan-and-Act: Improving Planning of Agents for Long-Horizon Tasks
results.reason: Planning framework, no ergodic theory.

results.title: UltraHorizon: Benchmarking Agent Capabilities in Ultra Long-Horizon Scenarios
results.reason: Long-horizon agent benchmark with 200k-token trajectories; benchmark-snapshot evaluation, not ergodic analysis.

results.title: AMA-Bench: Evaluating Long-Horizon Memory for Agentic Applications
results.reason: Memory benchmark; no ergodic content.

results.title: The Long-Horizon Task Mirage? Diagnosing Where and Why Agentic Systems Break
results.reason: Diagnostic study of long-horizon failures; no ergodic theory.
